diagram_title: Provide Tool-Result Recall Affordance Across Narrative Compaction

activities.title: Emit TOOL_INDEX in Anchor Body
activities.description: During narrative compaction's buildUserPayload, append explicit instruction to the LLM prompt: produce a fenced ## TOOL_INDEX table listing (tool_call_id, tool_name, args_brief, status, output_chars) for every pre-anchor tool call. Post-write validator scans persisted anchor body for the section; missing-section path emits compaction.tool_index.missing telemetry and proceeds with degraded affordance.

activities.title: Expose AI-Callable Recall Tool
activities.description: Define RecallTool via Tool.define pattern with parameter tool_call_id: string. Tool handler invokes Memory.Hybrid.recallByCallId, returns original tool output text with metadata {resolvedCallID, originalToolName, redundant}. Unknown id returns typed error with instruction to re-execute the original tool. Registered in registry.ts adjacent to RereadAttachmentTool.

activities.title: Inject Rebind-Aware System Note
activities.description: After applyStreamAnchorRebind runs and the active anchor has kind=narrative, prompt assembly prepends a system_block_amnesia_notice block with policy session_stable_until_next_anchor. Block content states tool history is narrative-compacted, TOOL_INDEX is authoritative, recall is the recovery mechanism. Skipped when anchor kind is hybrid_llm or server-side equivalent.

activities.title: Resolve callID to ToolPart from Stream
activities.description: Memory.Hybrid.recallByCallId(sessionID, callID) extends existing recallMessage namespace. Walks Session.messages stream, scans each message's parts for ToolPart whose callID matches. Returns the matched part or null. O(n) message scan; n is bounded by session message count. Idempotent — repeated calls return identical content.

activities.title: Emit Recall and TOOL_INDEX Telemetry
activities.description: Publish (a) compaction.tool_index.{emitted,missing} on every narrative anchor write with {sessionID, anchorId, entryCount, indexBytes}; (b) tool.recall.invoked on every recall call with {sessionID, callID, found, redundant}. Threaded into existing bus.session.compaction.* and tool-telemetry channels for ops visibility.

arrows.label: compaction kind selector (narrative path only; hybrid_llm and server-side bypass A1)
buildUserPayload prompt template + post-write anchor body validator
persisted anchor message with summary=true + kind=narrative + TOOL_INDEX section
tool registry exposes RecallTool unconditionally for build agent
matched ToolPart (output text + tool name) or null
anchor kind = narrative (gates whether A3 fires)
system_block_amnesia_notice prepended to next prompt assembly
anchor write outcome (emitted vs missing TOOL_INDEX)
Bus telemetry events for ops dashboards and drift detection
